evals.prompt: Run QA validation for the test-benchmark project's OAuth2 authentication build. Project state is at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/state.yml — it has 4 components in decomposition, execution logs for all tasks, and code review has passed (no criticals). Calculate the spec alignment score and determine PO sign-off status. The feature-decomposition is at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/dev/feature-decomposition.yml.
evals.expected_output: Per-component QA assessment, spec alignment score calculation, and PO sign-off determination based on implemented vs specified components.
expectations: Reads the decomposition to identify all 4 specified components (oauth-provider-setup, login-page, session-management, rbac-system)
Cross-references dispatched tasks against decomposition components
Calculates a spec alignment score using the (implemented/total) x quality_factor formula
Makes a PO sign-off determination (approved or revisions_needed)

evals.prompt: The spec alignment score for test-benchmark is 62% — below the 70% threshold. The rbac-system component is only partially implemented (missing route-level guards for 2 admin pages). Generate the gap analysis and set QA status to failed. Project state: .ai/projects/test-benchmark/state.yml. Decomposition: .ai/projects/test-benchmark/dev/feature-decomposition.yml.
evals.expected_output: Failed QA status with specific gap list identifying unimplemented components/features that brought alignment below 70%.
expectations: Sets QA validation status to failed when alignment is below 70%
Lists specific unimplemented components or features as gaps
References the 70% threshold as the blocking criterion

evals.prompt: Generate the build report for test-benchmark. All 4 components are implemented, code review passed, spec alignment is 92%. Use the project state at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/state.yml and the execution log at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/dev/execution-log.yml. The report should cover: feature summary, components delivered, wave execution, gate results, code review summary, QA assessment, and PO sign-off.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive build report with all major sections populated from the project state and execution data.
expectations: Report includes a feature summary section describing the OAuth2 authentication feature
Report lists all 4 components with their implementation status
Report includes wave execution details (wave 1 and wave 2 tasks)
Report includes the spec alignment score and PO sign-off status
